节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: This module provides the capability to manage the accounts of the enterprise devices.

Disallows the account or all accounts to add an OS account. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { boolean } disallow - true if the specific account or all accounts are not allowed to add an OS account.
@param { number } [accountId] - indicates the account ID. It cannot be the ID of an account that does not exist.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
true if the specific account or all accounts are not allowed to add an OS account.
number } [accountId] - indicates the account ID. It cannot be the ID of an account that does not exist.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Queries whether the account or all accounts is disallowed to add an OS account. This function can be called by a super administrator. If the admin is not empty, it must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { number } [accountId] - indicates the account ID. It cannot be the ID of an account that does not exist.
@returns { boolean } true if the specific account or all accounts are not allowed to add an OS account.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
number } [accountId] - indicates the account ID. It cannot be the ID of an account that does not exist.

节点.return_description: true if the specific account or all accounts are not allowed to add an OS account.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Adds an OS account using the name and account type. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission. 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { string } name - the OS account name. It cannot be empty.
@param { osAccount.OsAccountType } type - the OS account type. It can only be one of correct types.
@returns { Promise<osAccount.OsAccountInfo> } information about the OS account added.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9201003 - Failed to add an OS account.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
the OS account name. It cannot be empty.
the OS account type. It can only be one of correct types.

节点.return_description: information about the OS account added.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Failed to add an OS account.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Parameter error. Possible causes: 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;

节点.功能描述: Sets domain account policy. This function can be called by a super administrator. The admin must have the corresponding permission.
注释信息: @param { Want } admin - admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
@param { osAccount.DomainAccountInfo } domainAccountInfo - the infomation of domain account.
@param { DomainAccountPolicy } policy - policy indicates the domain account policy.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200001 - The application is not an administrator application of the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 9200002 - The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
@throws { BusinessError } 201 - Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
@throws { BusinessError } 801 - Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.

parameters.说明: admin indicates the enterprise admin extension ability information.
policy indicates the domain account policy.

error_codes.description: The application is not an administrator application of the device.
The administrator application does not have permission to manage the device.
Permission verification failed. The application does not have the permission required to call the API.
Capability not supported. Failed to call the API due to limited device capabilities.
